title: The Adventure Begins — Scene 1 (v2 ARCHIVE, 2026-06-22/23 pipeline)
logline: ARCHIVED REFERENCE, not live production. This is Scene 1 (Rainforest) exactly as it was produced by the pre-doctrine 'cleanslate' pipeline on 2026-06-22/23 — the render Julian named as by far the best take produced so far. Source: _archive_cleanslate_20260622/cbgen/render_scene1.py, read and reconstructed verbatim (never paraphrased or invented) plus the companion Gate-1 shot storyboard at _archive_cleanslate_20260622/cb-output/Ep1_The_Adventure_Begins_shot_package.json.
engine: ARCHIVE — how Scene 1 was actually made before the v5 / GATE3_ANIMATION_DOCTRINE.md system existed
style: Polished 3D CGI animation, Pixar/DreamWorks feature quality — physically-based rendering, soft global illumination, subsurface scattering on plush fur, large expressive eyes with warm catch-lights, cinematic depth of field, high-key warm saturated palette, soft rounded forms. 16:9. NOT 2D, NOT hand-drawn, NOT flat. 2–3 subtle crystal elements in the environment, soft bokeh. (quoted verbatim from the archived shot_package.json's `style` field)
_howThisWasMade: METHOD: single-image i2v (image-to-video) via cb_gen.generate_video_seedance() — NOT the current ref2vid/multi-reference system. Each beat was seeded from ONE start-frame image; there were no character-turnaround or scene-plate reference images fed into the render call at all.

CHAINING: beat 1 opened from a hand-built start frame (media/Ep1_S1_b1_start.png — this exact file no longer survives in the archive; the closest surviving artifact is the scene plate, Ep1_S1_plate.png, copied into this project as v2.B1's keyframe). Beats 2-4 each opened from cb_gen.last_frame() of the PREVIOUS beat's own rendered clip — literally the last frame extracted from the .mp4, no re-generation or clean-up pass of any kind.

VOICE: generate_audio=True — Seedance's OWN native audio generation produced the voices, music and SFX together in one pass. There was no separate ElevenLabs V3 track, no @Audio1 reference, no lip-sync step. Under the CURRENT doctrine (CLAUDE.md rule 4 / Law 5) this is explicitly forbidden — the voice must now come from a combined @Audio1 V3 track with no native-voice fallback. This archive predates that rule.

DIALOGUE IN PROMPT: every line of dialogue is spelled out verbatim inside the prompt text itself (e.g. 'Fuzzby, cheerful sing-song: "Bizzy bizzy bizzy... Nailed it!"'). Under the CURRENT doctrine this is also forbidden (Law 6 — dialogue words must never appear in the prompt, only speaker/timing/expression bindings). This archive predates that rule too.

IDENTITY: carried by a short repeated plain-text reminder inside every beat's prompt (the CONSIST string, quoted verbatim below) describing Fuzzby/Zenny by relative size, gender and temperament. Under the CURRENT doctrine this is forbidden — Law 5/CLAUDE.md rule 5 requires identity to come ONLY from reference images, never physical/appearance description text. This archive predates that rule.
RESOLUTION: 720p (cb_gen.generate_video_seedance(..., resolution='720p')) — the current pipeline fires at standard tier by default, a different setting.

OUTPUT: the 4 beats were rendered as 4 separate files (Ep1_S1_beat1.mp4 .. beat4.mp4) and were never stitched into a single scene file by this script — the WhatsApp video Julian referenced is one of these beats (or a manual edit combining them; the archive does not contain a combined-scene render, only the per-beat outputs and this script). A copy of the referenced WhatsApp video is attached to beat v2.B1 below as 'full-sequence-output' for convenience.

WHAT'S MISSING FROM THE ARCHIVE: the actual rendered .mp4 output files (Ep1_S1_beat1-4.mp4) and the very first start-frame image (Ep1_S1_b1_start.png) do not survive on disk in _archive_cleanslate_20260622/ — only the generation SCRIPT, the scene plate, the character sheet, and the Gate-1 shot storyboard survive there. Nothing has been invented to fill these gaps; they are named here as genuinely absent.

beats.storyBeat: Wide establish: Fuzzby and Zenny weave between tall pollen-flowers collecting pollen. Fuzzby dips into a flower, scoops a huge puff of pollen, overdoes it, spins once, bounces back upright beaming and proud. Cut wide: Fuzzby hovers proud frame-left; Zenny watches, calm and unimpressed, frame-right.

cuts.action: the sun-dappled rainforest of tall pollen-flowers, pollen motes drifting and crystals glinting, as Fuzzby and Zenny weave between the blooms collecting pollen
he dips into a flower, scoops a big puff of pollen, overdoes it and spins once, then bounces back upright beaming and proud, full of personality
cuts.dialogue: Fuzzby, cheerful sing-song: "Bizzy bizzy bizzy... Nailed it!"

cuts.action: Fuzzby frame-left hovers proud while Zenny frame-right watches him, calm and unimpressed

beats.firedPrompt: Multi-shot sequence with clean cuts between shots. Keep the two bees on-model and the Rainforest consistent throughout: Fuzzby = the BIGGER bumblebee (male, chaotic); Zenny = the SMALLER bumblebee (female, calm). Shot 1 (wide establishing, slow push-in): the sun-dappled rainforest of tall pollen-flowers, pollen motes drifting and crystals glinting, as Fuzzby and Zenny weave between the blooms collecting pollen. Shot 2 (cut to a medium shot of FUZZBY): he dips into a flower, scoops a big puff of pollen, overdoes it and spins once, then bounces back upright beaming and proud, full of personality. Fuzzby, cheerful sing-song: "Bizzy bizzy bizzy... Nailed it!" Shot 3 (cut to a wide two-shot): Fuzzby frame-left hovers proud while Zenny frame-right watches him, calm and unimpressed. Lively expressive character animation, snappy comic timing; avoid jitter, avoid identity drift.
beats.renderCall: cb_gen.generate_video_seedance(BEAT1, start='media/Ep1_S1_b1_start.png', resolution='720p', duration=12, generate_audio=True, out='Ep1_S1_beat1.mp4')
beats.startFrame: media/Ep1_S1_b1_start.png — NOT preserved in the archive; closest surviving artifact is the scene plate (attached below as this beat's keyframe)
beats.keyframePrompt_gate1Storyboard: as per the reference image of Fuzzby and Zenny; setting: lush rainforest of tall pollen-flowers, warm dappled light; ambient crystals in bokeh. / as per the reference image of Fuzzby mid-air by a big flower, dusted with pollen; bright rainforest; crystals in bokeh.
beats.i2vPrompt_gate1Storyboard: Bees drift flower to flower, petals sway; slow push-in. / Fuzzby zig-zags, scoops, spins into a leaf (FWIP), bounces back upright. Snappy comedic handheld.
beats.writerNote: Corresponds to Gate-1 storyboard shots 1.1 (rainforest-establish) + 1.2 (fuzzby-nailed-it) from the archived shot_package.json, merged into one continuous multi-shot take by render_scene1.py. Keyframe image attached is the scene's locked plate (Ep1_S1_plate.png), the closest surviving artifact to the true start frame. The attached clip is the referenced WhatsApp video, included here for direct playback.

beats.storyBeat: Zenny turns to Fuzzby and asks why he's humming. Fuzzby puffs up his chest, proudly declaring he's not a normal bee. Zenny delivers one slow deadpan blink and agrees. Fuzzby deflates a touch; Zenny gives the tiniest shrug.

cuts.action: Zenny (frame-right) turns to Fuzzby (frame-left), tilting her head
calm and dry, one eyebrow raised
he puffs up his chest, utterly self-important, wings flaring with pride
cuts.dialogue: Fuzzby, proud: "I am not a normal bee!"
Zenny, dry: "I can agree with that."

cuts.action: Fuzzby deflates a touch; Zenny gives the tiniest shrug

beats.firedPrompt: Multi-shot sequence with clean cuts between shots. Keep the two bees on-model and the Rainforest consistent throughout: Fuzzby = the BIGGER bumblebee (male, chaotic); Zenny = the SMALLER bumblebee (female, calm). Shot 1 (wide two-shot): Zenny (frame-right) turns to Fuzzby (frame-left), tilting her head. Shot 2 (cut to a medium close-up of ZENNY): calm and dry, one eyebrow raised. Zenny: "Fuzz-bee, why are you humming?" Shot 3 (cut to a medium close-up of FUZZBY): he puffs up his chest, utterly self-important, wings flaring with pride. Fuzzby, proud: "I am not a normal bee!" Shot 4 (cut to a medium close-up of ZENNY): one slow, flat, deadpan blink. Zenny, dry: "I can agree with that." Shot 5 (cut to a brief wide two-shot): Fuzzby deflates a touch; Zenny gives the tiniest shrug. Big personality, snappy comic timing; pollen motes drift, crystals twinkle. avoid jitter, avoid identity drift.
beats.renderCall: cb_gen.generate_video_seedance(BEAT2, start='media/_work/Ep1_S1_b2_start.png' [= last_frame(beat1.mp4)], resolution='720p', duration=14, generate_audio=True, out='Ep1_S1_beat2.mp4')
beats.startFrame: media/_work/Ep1_S1_b2_start.png — the last extracted frame of beat 1's own rendered clip (cb_gen.last_frame); not preserved in the archive
beats.keyframePrompt_gate1Storyboard: as per the reference image of Fuzzby and Zenny hovering together; bright rainforest; crystals in bokeh.
beats.i2vPrompt_gate1Storyboard: Fuzzby strikes a heroic mid-air pose, wobbles, drops, bounces off a petal, recovers; Zenny blinks deadpan.
beats.writerNote: Corresponds to Gate-1 storyboard shot 1.3 (not-a-normal-bee). The archived character sheet (Ep1_S1_charsheet.png) is attached to this beat as a reference image — it was NOT itself fed to the render call (this pipeline used no reference images at all); it's shown here as the character reference sheet available at the time.

beats.storyBeat: Fuzzby spots a big open flower and zips toward it eagerly. He plunges his whole face in and pulls back out with his face comically dusted in pollen like a moustache, beaming. Zenny looks him over, flat and unimpressed. Fuzzby wipes a bit off, sheepish.

cuts.action: Fuzzby (frame-left) spots a big open pollen-flower and zips toward it eagerly; Zenny (frame-right) watches
he plunges his whole face into the flower and pulls back out, his face comically dusted in pollen like a fuzzy moustache, beaming and tilting his head proudly
she looks him over, flat and unimpressed, one slow blink
Fuzzby wipes a bit of pollen off, sheepish; Zenny stays calm

beats.firedPrompt: Multi-shot sequence with clean cuts between shots. Keep the two bees on-model and the Rainforest consistent throughout: Fuzzby = the BIGGER bumblebee (male, chaotic); Zenny = the SMALLER bumblebee (female, calm). Shot 1 (wide two-shot): Fuzzby (frame-left) spots a big open pollen-flower and zips toward it eagerly; Zenny (frame-right) watches. Shot 2 (cut to a medium shot of FUZZBY): he plunges his whole face into the flower and pulls back out, his face comically dusted in pollen like a fuzzy moustache, beaming and tilting his head proudly. Fuzzby: "Do I look official?" Shot 3 (cut to a medium close-up of ZENNY): she looks him over, flat and unimpressed, one slow blink. Zenny, dry: "You look dusty." Shot 4 (cut to a brief wide two-shot): Fuzzby wipes a bit of pollen off, sheepish; Zenny stays calm. Big personality, snappy comic timing; pollen motes drift, crystals twinkle. avoid jitter, avoid identity drift.
beats.renderCall: cb_gen.generate_video_seedance(BEAT3, start='media/_work/Ep1_S1_b3_start.png' [= last_frame(beat2.mp4)], resolution='720p', duration=13, generate_audio=True, out='Ep1_S1_beat3.mp4')
beats.startFrame: media/_work/Ep1_S1_b3_start.png — the last extracted frame of beat 2's own rendered clip; not preserved in the archive
beats.keyframePrompt_gate1Storyboard: as per the reference image of Fuzzby, face comically dusted in pollen like a yellow moustache; flower bokeh; small crystals.
beats.i2vPrompt_gate1Storyboard: Fuzzby pulls his face from a flower covered in pollen, beams. Hold on the face.
beats.writerNote: Corresponds to Gate-1 storyboard shot 1.4 (do-i-look-official) — this is the same pollen-moustache gag later re-adopted and locked into config/gag_locks.json in the current pipeline (see CLAUDE.md history). No surviving image for this beat in the archive.

beats.storyBeat: Distant thunder rumbles; the sky darkens and light cools; both bees freeze and glance up. Fuzzby flinches then plays it cool with a breezy wave, cracking into a nervous gulp. Zenny calmly clocks the sky. Held long on a darkening wide as wind and the first raindrops arrive.

cuts.action: a low thunder rumbles; the sky begins to darken and the warm light cools; both bees freeze and glance up
he flinches, then plays it cool with a breezy little wave and a smug grin that cracks into a nervous gulp
cuts.dialogue: Fuzzby, breezy then a comic gulp: "Okay... that sounded dramatic."

cuts.action: she calmly tilts her head up at the blackening sky, utterly unimpressed, one slow blink
the wind gusts hard, petals and leaves whip past, the light goes cold and grey, both bees brace as the first fat raindrops fall — hold on this darkening wide for several seconds of rising tension

beats.firedPrompt: Multi-shot sequence with clean cuts between shots. Keep the two bees on-model and the Rainforest consistent throughout: Fuzzby = the BIGGER bumblebee (male, chaotic); Zenny = the SMALLER bumblebee (female, calm). Shot 1 (wide two-shot): a low thunder RUMBLES; the sky begins to darken and the warm light cools; both bees freeze and glance up. Shot 2 (cut to a medium close-up of FUZZBY): he flinches, then plays it cool with a breezy little wave and a smug grin that cracks into a nervous gulp. Fuzzby, breezy then a comic gulp: "Okay... that sounded dramatic." Shot 3 (cut to a medium close-up of ZENNY): she calmly tilts her head up at the blackening sky, utterly unimpressed, one slow blink. Zenny, flat and dry: "Storm's coming." Shot 4 (cut to a wide two-shot, HELD LONG): the wind gusts hard, petals and leaves whip past, the light goes cold and grey, both bees brace as the first fat raindrops fall — HOLD on this darkening wide for several seconds of rising tension. Big personality, cinematic timing; avoid jitter, avoid identity drift.
beats.renderCall: cb_gen.generate_video_seedance(BEAT4, start='media/_work/Ep1_S1_b4_start.png' [= last_frame(beat3.mp4)], resolution='720p', duration=15, generate_audio=True, out='Ep1_S1_beat4.mp4')
beats.startFrame: media/_work/Ep1_S1_b4_start.png — the last extracted frame of beat 3's own rendered clip; not preserved in the archive
beats.keyframePrompt_gate1Storyboard: as per the reference image of Zenny and Fuzzby small against a wide rainforest canopy; sky darkening at the edges; crystals in bokeh.
beats.i2vPrompt_gate1Storyboard: Both pause mid-hover; canopy stirs; light cools as clouds edge in.
beats.writerNote: Corresponds to Gate-1 storyboard shot 1.5 (storms-coming) — the scene's final beat, ending on the storm's arrival that carries into Scene 2. No surviving image for this beat in the archive.
